_meta.purpose: Mid-review sentences that mention the service/treatment. The review engine picks from this pool AND injects the patient's selected service name dynamically using the {{service}} placeholder.
rules: Use {{service}} as placeholder — engine replaces it with actual service name
Vary between 'I came for...' and 'My ... treatment was...'
